title: An Aerodynamic Model For Flapping-Wing Flight
abstract: A design-oriented aerodynamic model for flapping-wing flight based on modified strip theory, incorporating finite-wing unsteady wake effects through modified Theodorsen functions, partial leading-edge suction, and post-stall behavior.

title: Applications of the Unsteady Vortex-Lattice Method in Aircraft Aeroelasticity and Flight Dynamics
authors: J. Murua, R. Palacios, J. M. R. Graham
abstract: A comprehensive review of the unsteady vortex-lattice method and its applications in aircraft aeroelasticity, covering wake modeling, geometric nonlinearities, and coupled flight dynamics simulations.

title: Acceleration of Unsteady Vortex Lattice Method via Dipole Panel Fast Multipole Method
authors: Shuai Deng, Chen Jiang, Yunjie Wang, Haowen Wang
abstract: A novel acceleration technique for UVLM computations using dipole panel fast multipole method, achieving significant speedup while maintaining accuracy for flapping wing simulations.

title: A Variational Flexible Multibody Formulation for Partitioned Fluid-Structure Interaction: Application to Bat-Inspired Drones and Robotic Wings
authors: V. Joshi, R. K. Jaiman, C. Ollivier-Gooch
abstract: A variational flexible multibody dynamics formulation for partitioned fluid-structure interaction, applied to bat-inspired drone wings with large structural deformations and complex kinematics.
